sync_client_event_key_active_unique.name: sync_client_event_key_active_unique
sync_client_event_key_active_unique.where: "sync_client"."is_active" = true AND "sync_client"."is_revoked" = false AND "sync_client"."deleted_at" IS NULL

team_membership_user_non_mentor_active_u.name: team_membership_user_non_mentor_active_unique
team_membership_user_non_mentor_active_u.where: "team_membership"."is_active" = true AND "team_membership"."role" IN ('TEAM_LEADER', 'TEAM_MEMBER') AND "team_membership"."deleted_at" IS NULL
